column12: I decided the intrinsic value per number and what is the maximum i am willing to pay per increment. I put this value as 0.08p per number jump and hence decided upon 93. I t alos gave me the chance to get above 125 with a hiigh roll provided they did not do as well in the RNG section
column13: I thought anything over roughly 100 would be safe to get the higher pay out so then my decision was between choosing a lower number with a higher pay off and hope my random number was a high enough one, which I thought the probability of working would be about 1/6, or choose a high number straight away, sacrifice some pay off but be almost certain it would work. I chose to go higher and be certain.
